description: WORKERS OF THE WORLD UNITE Vol IX No 80 JAPANESE TROOPS CONCENTRATE ON SOVIET BORDER All OUT TO ANTI WAR MEET AT BRONX COLISEUM WED APRIL 6lli Atrocitiesl9l4 and 1932 A Japanese army or unannounced strength is marching itto Man churia from Korea at the point closest to the Soviet Union This move to war against the Soviet Union is not an isolated incident but follows up a whole series of provocative acts of Japanese imperialism The seriousness of this latest movement o ftroops aimed at the workers fatherland can be seen in its full significance in connection with the official war plans of Japanese imperialism A smoke screen of atrocity stories to cover the movement of these troops is being laid down by the imperialist supporters of Japan in France England and the United States The Daily Worker has repeatedly warned the workers of this constant drive for war against the Soviet Union We have warned the workers that the action of Japanese imperialism would not be an isolated move ment but would nvolve worldwide war operations particultrly by the puppets of French imperialism Poland and Rumania Japanese imperialism is carrying out this latest troop movement this latest provocative
